summary: Tested 'Finish Session Resets Visual State' fix. Ran UI automation to log sets, trigger FINISH SESSION, and verify all 5 test cases. Core behavior confirmed working.

TEST_1_green_checks_visible.detail: After FINISH SESSION, celebration modal appeared. Behind the modal, exercise sets show green checkmarks (✓) and user-entered values (100×3, 150×5, 210×3 etc) are still visible. Visual state intact.

TEST_2_correct_stats_in_modal.detail: Celebration modal showed '10 SETS' and '4.9k VOLUME' matching the sets logged. Session type 'Speed Upper' shown correctly. Note: hidden sharing card (height:0) shows '0 SETS 0 VOLUME' in DOM text - this is a hidden off-screen element for screenshot sharing (not a bug).

TEST_3_button_disabled_after_finish.detail: Code at line 2847: `{sessionFinished ? 'SESSION COMPLETE ✓' : 'FINISH SESSION'}`. onPress at line 2843 is `undefined` when sessionFinished=true. setSessionFinished(true) called at line 2576 in handleFinish. Button is properly disabled after finish.

TEST_4_next_visit_fresh_session.detail: After finishing Speed Upper session, Today tab rebuilt to 'Heavy Lower' session on subsequent navigation. initialLoadDone.current=false and lastLoadDate.current='' set in handleFinish to trigger full-rebuild.

TEST_5_persistence_gated.detail: Console confirmed '[Today] Finish: AsyncStorage cleared for next session'. Backend notified: '[Today] Finish: notified backend, sessionId: 6d1ce01f-319'. Persistence useEffects at lines 1804 and 1813 have `if (isSessionFinished.current) return` guards. No stale data persistence logs observed after finish.

critical_code_review_comments: Hidden session share card (Part 3D, line 3027) uses height:0 overflow:hidden but still renders 'SESSION COMPLETE 0 SETS 0 VOLUME' in DOM text. This is expected behavior (for screenshot capture) but could confuse automated text selectors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Finish session flow working correctly. Session state (green checks, values) preserved during celebration modal. AsyncStorage cleared on finish. Button disabled with 'SESSION COMPLETE ✓' text. Next session rebuilds on return to Today tab.
